ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "numeric_delivery_month" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the delivery month */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price for the day */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price during the day */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price during the day */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the day */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest at the end of the day */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades up to that day */,
  "total_open_interest" INTEGER /* Total open interest up to that day */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the prices are quoted */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* The time zone for the market data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "numeric_delivery_month", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* The ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry to which the instrument belongs */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country of the issuer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "numeric_representation" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the month */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the delivery month */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the delivery month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string from the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The path to the report file */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Whether the report can be shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chart */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument depicted in the chart */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the chart data */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the chart data */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, candlestick) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* The type of chart (e.g., line, bar, candlestick) */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* The time frame of the chart data (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* A list of user IDs with whom the chart is shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* The confidence score of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the predictive model used */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, volume below) */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* The type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* The status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* The sentiment of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_reports" (
  "earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the earnings report was released */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue reported in the earnings report */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit reported in the earnings report */,
  "guidance" TEXT /* Guidance provided in the earnings report */,
  "eps" TEXT /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "revenue_growth" TEXT /* Revenue growth compared to the previous period */,
  "profit_growth" TEXT /* Profit growth compared to the previous period */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the earnings report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the market indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the market indicator was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the market indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* The time frame for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on financial markets */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the event occurred */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the event information */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
